message:
beads: close bd-mblr.4.3 seed matrix as all children complete

Marked bd-mblr.4.3 (Deterministic Seed Matrix) as closed after both
child tasks completed:
- bd-mblr.4.3.1: FRANKEN_SEED constant, derive functions, SEED_MANIFEST.md
- bd-mblr.4.3.2: 13 reproducibility tests validating seed determinism

Also updated bd-mblr.4.3.2 close_reason with evidence of 13 tests covering
seed derivation, worker/scenario uniqueness, RNG reproducibility, OpLog
generation, and database state reproducibility.

Updated bd-mblr.4.4 dependency from container bead to concrete leaf blocker
(bd-mblr.4.3.2) for clearer artifact-bundle readiness tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
